title: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE: LINKING FARMERS, ADVISORS AND RESEARCHERS TO BOOST INNOVATION
subtitle: Extending farm advice beyond individual farmers towards farms
description: This practice abstract outlines a shift in farm advisory services from individual-focused advice to inclusive, group-based methods that engage all farm stakeholders. It highlights the need for advisors to develop new facilitation and integration skills to address diverse knowledge needs and support innovation uptake at the whole-farm level.
